arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford scores 80 seconds into Ruben Amorim's first Man Utd game
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford, starting up for Manchester United, gave Ruben Amorim a dream start to his tenure as head coach.

arts.ttl: Follow LIVE: Ruben Amorim takes charge of first Man United game
arts.sum: New Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim takes charge after replacing Erik ten Hag, as they visit Ipswich Town in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: 'It is impossible' - Ruben Amorim explains first Man United starting line-up and Ugarte decision
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim's Man United starting line-up for Sunday's clash with Ipswich Town features a few surprise calls.

arts.ttl: Why Gary Neville is absent from Sky Sports coverage for Ruben Amorim's first Man Utd game
arts.sum: Manchester United are hoping to usher in a new chapter under Ruben Amorim, who has made three changes from their 3-0 win over Leicester, but Gary Neville won't be present in the commentary box at Portman Road

arts.ttl: Why is Ed Sheeran an Ipswich fan? Pop star attends Premier League game against Manchester United
arts.sum: Portman Road, the home of Ipswich Town, may not have the same glamour associated with it as other sporting venues around the globe, but it’s good enough for pop superstar Ed Sheeran, who is in the stands for Sunday’s game against Manchester United. Speaking to the club’s website after his acquisition was announced, Sheeran said: “I am really excited to have bought a small percentage of my home town football club.

arts.ttl: I played for Sir Alex Ferguson when Man Utd burned out – Man City have fallen into the same trap
arts.sum: Gary Neville has referenced how Manchester United went down a similar path to Manchester City before Sir Alex Ferguson left

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Ruben Amorim names first Man Utd XI with three changes made for Ipswich
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim takes charge of Manchester United for the first time in the Premier League as the Red Devils make the trip to Portman Road to take on Ipswich Town and former coach Kieran McKenna

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim names Man United team to face Ipswich
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has named his first Manchester United team as the Red Devils take on Ipswich Town in the Premier League. Amorim takes charge of Manchester United for the first time at Portman Road on Sunday, having begun his reign in charge during the international break. arts.ttl: Team News: Who makes Amorim's first Man United XI? Will the Red Devils play 3-4-3?
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim names his first Red Devils XI, with the 20-time English champions in action against Ipswich Town at Portman Road.
